# CWE-341 vulnerable — Predictable from Observable State
lang: go
file: CWE-341-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"time"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func CreateDeviceToken(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	token := fmt.Sprintf("%d-%d-%s", os.Getpid(), time.Now().Unix(), c.Request.URL.Query().Get("device"))
	return db.Exec("INSERT INTO device_tokens (token) VALUES (?)", token)
}
